description_long: This is a large, heavily armored combat tactical vehicle resembling a main battle tank, painted in a light desert tan color. The vehicle features a prominent, long-barreled main cannon mounted on a rotating turret, with additional equipment such as a machine gun and various hatches visible on the turret roof. The hull is robust and angular, with thick armor plating covering the entire body, including the sides, front, and rear. The vehicle moves on wide, continuous metal tracks supported by multiple road wheels, providing stability and traction over rough terrain. Antennas, storage boxes, and external tools are mounted on the exterior, indicating readiness for extended operations. The overall design emphasizes protection, firepower, and mobility in urban or battlefield environments.
description: A large, tan-colored armored tank with a long cannon, rotating turret, and metal tracks, featuring heavy armor and external equipment.
description_view_0: Front view shows the thick frontal armor, main cannon, and turret details, with headlights and track guards visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the length of the cannon, side armor skirts, track system, and turret-mounted machine gun.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the engine exhaust grilles, rear armor, and storage compartments, with the turret and cannon facing forward.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the track system, side armor, and turret features, with visible external equipment.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the turret front, one machine gun mount on the turret roof, and possible additional mounts for small arms or equipment on the turret sides.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with thick, sloped panels covering the front, sides, and rear; turret and hull both heavily armored with visible reinforced sections.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid desert tan color with no visible camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: White number '3' on the left and right side skirts; no other visible insignia or symbols.
